name: Grekhova
note: Off-Meta BO6 Machine-Pistol (9x18 Makarov, 750 RPM full-auto, 20-round). AMMUNITION=generischer Pistol-Pool (.50, weicht vom Kaliber ab). reload roh '2530 s' -> 2.53. Extrahiert trotz Freeze (window.__ext frisch verifiziert).

AMMUNITION: .500 AET Rounds :: -30% Target Flinch | -20% Bullet Velocity
BARREL: CHF Barrel :: +49% Gun Kick | +20% Horiz. Recoil | +50% Vert. Recoil
FIRE MODS: Rapid Fire :: Does not modify damage profile | -10% Bullet Velocity | +5.2% Fire Rate | +14.8% Gun Kick | +10% Horiz. Recoil | +15% Vert. Recoil
Recoil Springs :: -13% Gun Kick | -13.1% Horiz. Recoil | -13% Vert. Recoil
MAGAZINE: Extended Mag I :: +17.5% ADS Time | +30% Reload | +31.8% Sprint to Fire
Fast Mag I :: -12.5% ADS Time | -17% Reload | -18.2% Sprint to Fire
Extended Mag II :: +27.5% ADS Time | +27.7% Reload | +50% Sprint to Fire
Extended Mag III :: +37.5% ADS Time | +44.7% Reload | +68.2% Sprint to Fire
MUZZLE: Ported Compensator :: -19.1% Gun Kick | -20% Vert. Recoil
Monolithic Suppressor :: +10.3% Range | +20% Bullet Velocity | +27.5% ADS Time
